inputs.label: Total Clicks
inputs.businessContext: Total number of unique clicks on links in the email campaign.

inputs.label: Total Delivered Emails
inputs.businessContext: Total number of emails successfully delivered to recipients' inboxes.

inputs.label: Total Opens
inputs.businessContext: Total number of times the email was opened (optional, for click-to-open rate).

inputs.label: Total Sent Emails
inputs.businessContext: Total number of emails sent in the campaign.

inputs.label: Bounced Emails
inputs.businessContext: Number of emails that were not delivered due to hard or soft bounces.
